bas-key-lime-pie.name: Ba's Key Lime Pie

ingredients.item: Fresh key lime (or regular lime) juice

instructions: Preheat oven to 325°. Using your hands, crush graham crackers in a large bowl until coarsely ground (you could do this in a food processor if you’d like, just be sure not to process too finely; you want some texture in the larger pieces). Add butter, coconut oil, sugar, and salt and mix until well blended (mixture will resemble wet sand). Transfer to a 9" pie dish. Using your fingers and the underside of a flat measuring cup, press mixture evenly into bottom and up sides of dish. Bake crust, rotating once halfway through, until golden brown on top and crumbs are set, 12–15 minutes. Let cool.

Using an electric mixer on medium speed, beat egg yolks and condensed milk in a large bowl until paler and almost doubled in volume, about 5 minutes. Whisk in 2 tsp. lime zest, lime juice, and salt. Pour into cooled crust. Bake pie until filling is starting to slightly puff around the edges and center jiggles slightly, 15–20 minutes. Let cool completely.

Whip cream and powdered sugar in a large bowl until stiff peaks form. Gently whisk in yogurt and rum, if using. Dollop onto cooled pie, creating dramatic peaks and valleys with an offset spatula or the back of a spoon. Garnish with lime zest.
Do Ahead: Crust can be baked 2 days ahead; pie without whipped topping can be made 2 days ahead; pie can be assembled (with topping) 4 hours ahead. 

Editor’s note: This recipe was originally published in April 2015. This way for more of our best pie recipes →

baby-back-ribs.name: Baby Back Ribs
instructions: Cut ribs into 4 equal portions.
Tear off 4 pieces of aluminum foil big enough to enclose each portion of ribs. Grease each piece of foil with cooking spray.
Brush ribs liberally with barbecue sauce; place each portion of ribs on a piece of foil. Wrap tightly and refrigerate for 8 hours to overnight.
Preheat the oven to 149°C (150 degrees C). Bake ribs wrapped tightly in foil in the preheated oven for 2 ½ hours. Remove ribs from foil and serve with more sauce, if desired.
Enjoy!

baileys-ice-cream-sundae.name: Baileys Ice Cream Sundae
instructions: Scoop your favorite vanilla ice cream into a dish, add 2 oz. of Baileys Original Irish Cream, smash up pretzels and sprinkle on to top.

baked-lobster-recipe-a-delight-comedera.name: Baked Lobster Recipe, A Delight
baked-lobster-recipe-a-delight-comedera.original_name: Receta de langosta al horno, una delicia

ingredients.item: 1 cda of herbs (thyme, dry cilantro, oregano and other)

instructions: We're gonna start by washing our locusts and bringing them to the freezer and get them frozen for 2 hours. That will allow the locusts to be compact with cutting and juicy as we bake them.

After that time, we get the locusts out of the freezer and with a sharp knife we're gonna cut them in half. We put pressure with the knife's end at the start of the tail and cut down always by pressuring the knife's handle. Let's book.
With the knife you're going to take off some lobster meat so that it stands out from the shell and easier to eat. Anyway, you'll cut him some small cuts onto his flesh surface.
Preheat your oven at 220 degrees Celsius.
In a frying pan, you'll put the butter with the steamed garlic to drink. Later, we will add the pepper, paprika and heirlooms. We mix and withdraw from fire.
When we withdraw from the fire, we'll add the lemon juice, we'll mix.
Tomaremos las colas de langostas, la colocaremos en una bandeja con papel de cocina.
Con una cuchara, le agregaremos la mantequilla con el ajo y las especias en la  carne de la langostas, tratando de que cubre todo.
Then you'll spread his parmesan cheese to get them to fry.
Hornea for 15 minutes, at this time the meat from the locusts had to absorb all the taste of butter, garlic and spices. Also, parmesan cheese will be golden and crispy.
We're done! You'll be ready to enjoy this delight.

baked-mini-pumpkin-pots.name: Baked Mini Pumpkin Pots
instructions: » Preheat the oven to 177°C and line a baking sheet with parchment paper. Slice the top quarter off each pumpkin and remove the seeds and stringy bits.
» In a medium skillet over medium-high heat, sauté the sausage for 3 to 4 minutes, until cooked through. Drain off any rendered fat and set aside.
» Whisk 1 of the eggs, and toss it in a large bowl with the sausage, bread cubes, sage, parsley, salt, and pepper until well combined.

» Fill each pumpkin with the stuffing mixture to a little less than 1 inch from the top, and place it on the prepared sheet. Bake for 40 minutes, until the pumpkins have soft- ened. Remove the pan from the oven and use a spoon to compress the stuffing a little. Pour 1 of the remaining 4 eggs into each pumpkin. Lightly cover the pumpkins with a sheet of aluminum foil. Increase the heat to 204°C and return the sheet to the oven. Bake for another 10 minutes, until the eggs are just set.
» Serve hot, topped with about a teaspoon of crème fraîche and more salt and pepper to taste.

baked-peach-bourbon-bbq-chicken-breast.name: Baked Peach-bourbon Bbq Chicken Breast

ingredients.item: Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Preheat the oven to 191°C (190 degrees C).

Combine ketchup, brown sugar, bourbon, peach preserves, vinegar, Worcestershire sauce, mustard, steak seasoning, and liquid smoke flavoring in a saucepan over medium high heat. Bring to a boil and simmer for 5 minutes. Reserve half the sauce for later use.
Place chicken on a sheet pan or broiling tray and brush sauce onto the chicken with a basting brush.
Bake chicken in the preheated oven for 15 minutes, then flip chicken breasts over and baste with reserved sauce.
Set an oven rack about 6 inches from the heat source and turn on the oven's broiler.

Broil chicken and continue to baste and flip the chicken every 3 minutes until chicken is no longer pink in the center and the juices run clear, 10 to 15 minutes total. An instant-read thermometer inserted into the center should read at least 74°C (74 degrees C).

baked-potato-salad.name: Baked Potato Salad
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Prick potatoes several times with a fork and transfer to a baking sheet. Bake in the preheated oven until potatoes are easily pierced with a fork, 50 minutes to 1 hour.

Line a baking sheet with aluminum foil and lay bacon strips in a single layer. Transfer baking sheet to the oven while potatoes are baking, cooking bacon until browned and crisp, about 15 minutes. Drain bacon slices on paper towels.
Remove cooked potatoes from oven and set aside to cool.
Crumble cooled bacon and cut potatoes into bite-sized pieces. Peel the potatoes or leave the skins on, depending on your preference.

Combine most of the bacon, most of the Cheddar cheese, sour cream, and mayonnaise in a large bowl; season with salt and pepper. Stir to blend. Add diced potatoes and toss gently to coat with a spatula.
Sprinkle remaining Cheddar cheese and bacon over the top of the salad before serving.

baked-prawns-recipe-comedera.name: Baked Prawns Recipe
baked-prawns-recipe-comedera.original_name: Receta casera de langostinos al horno
instructions: The first thing we'll do will be to preheat the oven at 180 degrees Celsius.

Then we'll get a big and oven-free fountain. Before we place any ingredient inside, we'll cover it with an oil cape. It will be sufficient to add a chorrit and distribute it throughout the background with the help of a kitchen brush or with a piece of paper absorbing.
Ahora vamos a colocar los langostinos en la fuente, con cuidado de que no se superpongan. Ten en cuenta que los langostinos ya deben estar bien limpios y listos para cocinar.
The next thing you have to do, we'll have to wash up the parsley. Then we'll get his leaves and put them into a kitchen robot to make a condiment.
We will also peel our garlic teeth and place them in the robot with parsley and a teaspoon of oil.

Procesaremos ambos ingredientes en el robot hasta obtener una pasta, que luego distribuiremos por encima de los langostinos. Si no tienes robot de cocina en casa, puedes simplemente picar menudamente y mezclar todos los ingredientes del condimento.

Then we'll put the fountain with locusts into the oven for about 15 minutes. At half the time, we'll open the oven and turn every lobster, to make sure they get cooked very well. Keep in mind that cooking time may vary with the power of each oven, so don't stop monitoring the locusts throughout their cooking, to make sure they aren't passing. You will know that they are well cooked after they have completely lost their grey color, and this will be replaced by an aptiquic orange.

When you get the locusts out of the oven, we'll have them sewed with a couple of ingredients before we serve them. The first thing to do will be to spread a little seawater (at best). Then we'll cut both lemons in half and remove their seeds and water the locusts with the juice.
That's all. Our baked locusts are ready to serve them.

baked-pumpkin-with-rosemary-and-orange.name: Baked Pumpkin With Rosemary And Orange

ingredients.item: Handful of coarsely chopped parsley leaves

instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Peel squash, discarding seeds and fibers. Cut flesh into large, bite-sized pieces. Transfer squash to a steamer basket or metal colander and steam over boiling water until tender when pierced with the tip of a knife, 15–20 minutes.

Heat 5 Tbsp. oil in a medium skillet over medium. Add chile, garlic, rosemary, and orange zest and cook until aromatic. Add breadcrumbs and parsley and cook, stirring occasionally, until they color lightly (they should be no darker than a pale gold).

Transfer squash to a shallow baking dish or roasting pan; season with salt and pepper. Add butter in small pieces. Sprinkle breadcrumb mixture over and drizzle lightly with oil. Bake pangrattato until crumbs are deep gold and sqaush is fully tender, 35–40 minutes.

baked-ravioli-lezzet.name: Baked Ravioli
instructions: 1. For dough, take flour to kneading container.
2. Open the middle part like the pool and add eggs and salt.
3. Imit the juice slowly and knead until you get a smooth dough.
4. Wrap the dough with stretch film and rest for 30 minutes.
5. Take the rested dough into four equal glands.
6. Open each bezeyi with the help of a roller by taking on lightly unified countertop and split into square parts.
7. Cut the two-thirds strips.
8. For the inner mortar, the mink, grazed onion, salt, pepper, red pepper and a large bowl of zahteri.
9. Place small parts from the stairs on the dough of mantı.
10. Paste the middle part to be clear by combining the mutual edges of the dough.
11. 11. 11. 11. Posted by mantıes by cutting the places you are glued.
12. Index of shredded shredded casserole containers.
12. August Preheated 180 degrees cook until the oven frozes.
14 July Visit the hot meat water until you get from the oven and go to the oven and continue cooking until the mantılar soften.
15. For the service, rubbed in a container that is kneaded.
16. Girl butter in a small sauce pot.
17. September Add and mix the mint and get from the stove.
18. Take away from the oven and serve hot by visiting cottage yogurt and mint butter.
19. September You can also try the tray sleeve recipe with a different version.

banana-and-carrot-cake-step-by-step-come.name: Banana And Carrot Cake Step By Step
banana-and-carrot-cake-step-by-step-come.original_name: Bizcocho de plátano y zanahoria paso a paso
instructions: It purifies the oven to 180 been 3 been (177 been 3) and grease a baker's mold.
In a big bowl, pat the bananas to get a purée. Reds carrots and add them to the banana purée.
Add sugar, oil, eggs and vanilla extract. Mix well till all ingredients are well integrated.

In another bowl, pits flour, sodium bicarbonate, baking powder, salt and cinnamon. It incorporates the dried ingredients into the banana and carrot blend little by little, gently mixing up to a homogeneous mass.
If you wish, add minced nuts to the dough and mix well.
Fold the dough into the prepared mold and clear the surface with a scatula. Hornea for 40-45 minutes, or while inserting a stick at the centre, it goes clear.
Deja enfriar el bizcocho en el molde durante 10 minutos antes de desmoldarlo y dejarlo enfriar completamente sobre una rejilla.

banana-and-oat-muffins-recipe-step-by-st.name: Banana And Oat Muffins Receives step by step
banana-and-oat-muffins-recipe-step-by-st.original_name: Receta de muffins de banana y avena paso a paso

ingredients.item: 1 / 3 cup of vegetable or coconut oil
1 / 4 cup of milk (may be almond, soybean or whatever)
Optional: minced nuts (chocolate sparks or raisins)

instructions: It purifies the oven at 180 been 3 been (177 been 3) and prepares a muffins old with capacitors.
In a big bowl, mix flour, oatmeal, powder leaven, sodium bicarbonate, cinnamon and salt.
In another bowl, beat the broken bananas, broken Sugar, eggs, oil, milk and vanilla extract till they are well combined.
Add the dry mixture to the moist bad little by little, gently mixing until everything's well incorporated. If you wish, add minced nuts, chocolate spots or risins.
Filling mods for muffins up to 3 / 4 of its capacity.
Hornea for 20-25 minutes, or until a stick inserted into the centre goes clear.
Let the muffins cool into the old for 5 minutes, then transfer them to a grid to get them completely cold.

banana-split-with-chocolate-teleculinari.name: Banana Split With Chocolate

ingredients.item: Rodelas de banana e lascas de chocolate branco para decorar

instructions: Crudely crush the cookies. Beat the cream in whipped cream, adding sugar to taste. Reserve.
In a pot, pour condensed milk, milk and yolks. Take it to the fire, always stirring until it thickens. Take it out and put it in a bowl.

Peel and crush the bananas. In a glass cup, have alternate layers of cookie, whipped cream and banana. Finish with a little cookie and decorate with banana slices and white chocolate chips. Take it to the cold until it serves.

banoffee-banana-toffee-pie.name: Banoffee (banana Toffee) Pie
instructions: Place unopened can of condensed milk in a large pot; cover with water. Bring to boil; reduce to a simmer. Cover pot with lid and simmer for 3 hours to make the toffee, checking periodically to ensure the can is still immersed and adding more water as needed.
Remove can from the pot and allow to cool until safe to handle. Rinse with cold running water for 10 minutes to speed up cooling.
Open carefully and stir toffee until smooth. Spread toffee over the bottom of the prepared graham pie crust. Chill for at least 1 hour.
Layer sliced bananas on top of the toffee. Beat cream in a large bowl until soft peaks form. Add sugar and continue to beat until fluffy. Spread whipped cream over bananas.

barley-with-mushrooms-and-zucchini-argir.name: Barley With Mushrooms And Zucchini
instructions: Cut all the vegetarians first.
In salted moiling water, add the barley, boil and drain. We keep some of the water that built the barley to dilute the vegetarian sauce if we want it more fluid.
Sprinkle the barley with 2 tabletspoons olive oil. Mix and set aside.
Heat the olive oil in a plate pot and sauteé the garlic broken for 1 minute.
Add the mushrooms and sauté for 2-3′ to drop their volume.
Add the zucchini and sauté for 3-4′.
Finally, add the tomatoes and sauce 2′ to a strong Always fire. Salt and pepper.
Add the fresh onions and mix 1-2–1, just during to oil.
Sprinkle with parsley and add the cream. Boil for 1′′.
We withdraw from the fire. Add the boated barley to the pot and if you want the vegetarian sauce more chin, add some of the water built by the pasta.
Mix very well and serve.

bean-and-grain-stew-with-garlic-and-chil.name: Bean And Grain Stew With Garlic And Chiles

ingredients.prep: cranberry, or pinto beans, soaked overnight, drained
whole hull-less barley, rye berries, wheat berries

ingredients.item: Coarsely torn whole wheat sourdough bread

ingredients.prep: center ribs and stems removed, torn into large pieces

instructions: Heat a medium skillet, preferably cast iron, over medium-high until very hot. Carefully lay a piece of foil inside skillet, followed by onion, cut sides down. Char onion until totally blackened on cut sides, about 15 minutes. Wipe out skillet and reserve.

Transfer onion to a small pot. Add beans and enough water to cover them by about 2". Give everything a stir and bring to a boil over medium-high heat, then reduce heat and simmer, skimming off any foam and adding water if needed to keep beans submerged, until beans are tender, 1½–2 hours. Season with salt. Ideally, they should cool overnight in their cooking liquid, but they’ll still be awesome if you can’t hit pause at this point.
Meanwhile, cook grains in a large pot of boiling salted water until al dente, 50–70 minutes. Let cool in their liquid—ideally overnight, but same story as with the beans.

Preheat oven to 300°. Toss bread with ¼ cup oil on a large rimmed baking sheet. Season with salt. Squeeze and toss bread to absorb as much oil as possible. Bake until croutons are well-browned and very crisp, 35–45 minutes.
Meanwhile, combine chile and rice vinegar in a small bowl. Soak until ready to use.

Bring garlic and ½ cup oil to a simmer in a small saucepan over medium heat. Cook, lowering heat as needed to maintain a gentle simmer and swirling occasionally, until garlic is golden brown, 12–14 minutes. Using a slotted spoon, transfer garlic chips to paper towels. Reserve garlic oil.

Heat remaining 2 Tbsp. olive oil in reserved medium skillet over medium-high. Add mushrooms and cook, undisturbed, until browned underneath, about 2 minutes. Toss and continue to cook, tossing occasionally and adding kale a few pieces at a time, until mushrooms are browned and crisp and kale is just wilted, 5–6 minutes. Season with salt; transfer to a plate.

Transfer 2 cups grains (including some of their liquid) to a medium bowl; wipe out pot. Return grains and their liquid to pot. Add 4 cups cooked beans (including some of their liquid; discard onion). Bring to a simmer. Add red wine vinegar and ⅓ cup garlic oil. Season to taste with salt and pepper. Just before serving, chop half of mushrooms and kale and fold into stew. Add lemon juice, half of croutons, and half of garlic chips. Taste and add more lemon juice, if needed.
Divide stew among bowls and top with remaining mushrooms, kale, croutons, and garlic chips. Top with chives and drained chile slices. Drizzle with remaining garlic oil as desired.
Do Ahead: Beans and grains can be cooked 1 day ahead; let cool in their cooking liquid.

beans-with-rice-greens-and-roe-argiro.name: Beans With Rice, Greens And Roe
beans-with-rice-greens-and-roe-argiro.original_name: Φασόλια με ρύζι, χόρτα και αυγοτάραχο
instructions: Boil the Beans first until they soften, about 30 minutes and pour the water.
In a pot, heat half the oil and sauté the onion, leek, hot pepper, carrot and celery for 4-5 minutes.
Add the half-Boiled beans, the paste and warm water to cover the injectors.
Let the black-eyed beans boil until already ready. Then, add the brown rice, 2 cups of hot water and greens.
Mix, season and boil until it turns into a dick soup with a little zoom.
Rub on each plate a little eggmeal.

beef-brisket-in-the-oven-argiro.name: Beef Brisket In The Oven

ingredients.item: 11⁄2 kg on the side of beef with bone
11⁄2 kg on the side of beef with bone

instructions: The calf brasts are a beat very tasty with enough fat, so it remains humory and Tender after long cooking. We start it in the kitchen eye and finish it in the oven.
Preheat the evening to 170-180 degrees C in residence.
With kitchen paper, dry the meat well.
Heat a large pan or gas a baking pan.
Melt the butter and add the olive oil over high heat.
Salt and pepper the meat well from the fat side and place it in the hot pan with the fat side down, touch the pan.
Wash it well for 7-8 minutes, turn it on the other side and add.
Put the brown side on a baking pan and lower the heat.
Place the onion, celery and garlic in the pan. Mix and sauce for 2 minutes.
Add the thyme and the paste and put the wine out.
Decorate-crub the base of the pan well and let it boil and then pour the meat into the baking pan.
Bake the meat covered for 1.5 hours by pouring it from time to time with the liquids of the baking pan.
Uncover and continue baking for 30 minutes to soften and turn the beat well.
After baking, transfer to a platter and cut into slides between the bones, like ribbs, or unbleach the brast side and cut easily into thin slices.
Serve with vegetables and chewed potatoes or baked potatoes.
Learn the proper way to cook for each piece of the calf.

beef-tagliata-with-crispy-potatoes-argir.name: Beef Tagliata With Crispy Potatoes

ingredients.item: 700-800 gr aproximately vs. Spalobrizala beef without bone
1 onion small cut into nick slides
700-800 gr aproximately vs. Spalobrizala beef without bone
1 onion small cut into nick slides

instructions: In bowls, mix the olive oil, rosemary, thyme, salt and pepper.
Brush the beef steak with a brush, add the onion and brown garlic and leave it sprinkled in the refrigerator for a few hours.
Remove the meat from the counter 1 hour and 30 minutes before taking so that it comes to room temperature. We can marinate from the night before.
Heat the grill or pan on high heat and when it burns well, make the taliata for a few minutes on each side-defending on our preference.
Cut into thin slices, perpendicular to the meat fibers, and serve with a peach parmesan salad and crispy ocean potatoes.
Drizzle with olive oil and lemon or with olive oil and balsamic.

beer-batter.name: Beer Batter
instructions: Whisk flour and beer together in a bowl until just combined; batter will be lumpy.

beignets.name: Beignets
instructions: Dissolve yeast in warm water. Pour into a large bowl and stir in evaporated milk, white sugar, eggs, and salt. Add 4 cups flour and beat until smooth.
Mix in shortening. Mix in remaining 3 cups flour. Cover and refrigerate for at least 2 hours, or up to 24 hours.
Roll dough out on floured surface to 1/8-inch thick. Cut into 2 1/2-inch squares.

Heat oil in a deep pot to 182°C (180 degrees C). Fry beignets in batches until browned and puffed. (If beignets sink and do not pop up, oil is not hot enough.) Remove from oil with a slotted spoon and drain on paper towels.
Shake confectioners' sugar over hot beignets. Serve immediately. Enjoy!

berries-and-rum-frozen-cocktail.name: Berries And Rum Frozen Cocktail
instructions: Purée blackberries, raspberries, rum, simple syrup, lime juice, and 2 cups ice in a blender until smooth and very thick (mixture will loosen immediately once poured). Divide among glasses and garnish with blackberries, if desired.

better-than-ice-cream-baked-beans.name: Better Than Ice Cream Baked Beans
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Cook and stir bacon in a large, deep skillet over medium-high heat until evenly browned, about 10 minutes. Drain on a paper towel-lined plate.
Combine bacon, baked beans, kidney beans, pinto beans, chili beans, brown sugar, ketchup, and Worcestershire sauce in a large bowl; transfer to a large baking dish and top with Parmesan cheese.
Bake in the preheated oven until cheese melts and beans are bubbling, about 45 minutes. Cool before serving, 20 minutes.

bhindi-ki-sabzi.name: Bhindi Ki Sabzi

ingredients.item: Indian green chile or serrano chile

instructions: Heat oil in a large skillet over medium. Add ajwain seeds and cook, stirring, until golden brown, about 1 minute. Add turmeric and asafetida and swirl skillet to combine, then add chile. Increase heat to high; add okra, coriander, and fennel seeds and toss gently with a metal or other heatproof spatula (you don’t want to smash the okra). Reduce heat to medium and spread out okra in an even layer. Cook, tossing halfway through, until starting to brown, about 10 minutes total. (Tossing instead of stirring is the best way to keep the okra intact and from getting gummy.) Season with salt and continue to cook, turning occasionally, until lightly charred, about 5 minutes longer. (Okra may look gummy at first, but eventually it will start to char).
Remove okra from heat; gently mix in amchoor and add lime juice to taste. Season with more salt if needed.

big-island-wild-pig-with-cavatelli.name: Big Island Wild Pig With Cavatelli

ingredients.item: Boneless pork shoulder (boston butt) or wild boar
Coarsely crumbled soft fresh goat cheese (about 6 ounces)

instructions: Preheat oven to 191°C. Enclose fennel seeds in resealable plastic bag; using mallet, coarsely crack seeds. (Alternatively, crack seeds in mortar with pestle.) Mix seeds, smoked paprika, brown sugar, crushed red pepper, 3/4 teaspoon salt, and 1/4 teaspoon black pepper in small bowl to blend. Place pork on sheet of foil. Sprinkle spice mixture all over pork and roll pork on foil sheet, pressing firmly so spices will adhere.

Heat oil in heavy large ovenproof pot over medium-high heat. Add pork to pot and sear until brown on all sides, 8 to 9 minutes. Add 3 cups broth and any seasoning mixture remaining on sheet of foil; bring to boil. Cover pot tightly and transfer to oven. Braise until pork is very tender, turning pork every 30 minutes, about 2 hours total. Remove pot from oven. Uncover pot and cool pork in pot 1 hour.

Transfer pork to cutting board. Cut pork into 1/2- to 3/4-inch cubes. Spoon off fat from top of sauce in pot. Return pork cubes to sauce in pot. DO AHEAD Can be made 1 day ahead. Chill uncovered until cold, then cover and keep chilled. Rewarm pork and sauce over medium heat until heated through before using.
Cook pasta in large pot of boiling salted water until tender but still firm to bite, stirring occasionally. Drain pasta. Set aside.

Melt butter in large skillet over medium-high heat. Add garlic to skillet; stir 30 seconds. Add tomatoes and arugula and toss until arugula wilts, 2 to 3 minutes. Add drained pasta to tomato mixture in skillet and toss 1 minute to blend. Add 1 cup crumbled goat cheese to skillet and toss just until cheese softens slightly but does not melt, about 1 minute. Season pasta to taste with salt and black pepper. Transfer pasta to large bowl. Spoon pork and sauce over. Scatter remaining 1/4 cup goat cheese over and serve.

birthday-cookie-cake.name: Birthday Cookie Cake
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Grease and flour two 9-inch round baking pans.

Stir together sugar, flour, cocoa, baking powder, baking soda, and salt for cake in a large bowl. Add milk, oil, eggs, and vanilla; beat with an electric mixer on medium speed for 2 minutes. Stir in boiling water; batter will be thin. Pour batter into the prepared pans.

Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted in the middles comes out clean, 30 to 35 minutes. Remove from the oven and cool for 10 minutes in the pans. Invert carefully onto wire racks and let cool completely, about 30 minutes.
Prepare whipped cream by beating cream, sugar, and vanilla in a large mixing bowl on high speed until soft peaks form in the mixture. Stir in crushed cookies.
Frost the cooled cake cake with whipped cream, adding some in between layers. Place cake on a paper-lined surface. Chill any unused whipped cream.
Bring cream for glaze to a boil in a small saucepan over medium-low heat. Remove from the heat and add chocolate chips; stir until melted.

Spread glaze over the cake, allowing some to flow down over the sides. Decorate the top of the cake with remaining crushed cookies. Pipe any remaining whipped cream on the top and around the edges of the cake.

bison-sausage-apple-and-sage-strata.name: Bison Sausage, Apple And Sage Strata

ingredients.item: Loaf firm-textured french or italian bread

instructions: Preheat oven to 177°C. Coat a 3-quart rectangular baking dish with cooking spray; set aside. Cook bison sausage and onion over medium heat in an extra-large skillet until bison sausage is brown. Add apple and cook for 5 more minutes. Drain off fat.
Whisk eggs, milk, sage, and pepper in a large bowl.
Place bread cubes in prepared baking dish. Top with bison sausage mixture and the cheese. Gently mix to evenly distribute ingredients. Pour egg mixture over bread mixture.
Bake, uncovered, for 40 to 45 minutes or until a knife inserted near the center comes out clean. Let stand for 10 minutes before serving.

bistec-encebollado-cuban-steak-and-onion.name: Bistec Encebollado (cuban Steak And Onions)
instructions: Combine salt, pepper, and garlic powder in a small bowl. Sprinkle over steak slices on all sides to season. Transfer steak to a resealable plastic bag and add sliced onions, vinegar, and onion powder. Move steaks around to combine with the marinating ingredients. Seal the bag and refrigerate for 1 hour.
Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium heat. Add steak and onion mixture; cook and stir until steak is browned and onions are soft, 4 to 6 minutes. Remove from the skillet and keep warm.

Add beef broth, sofrito, and garlic to the skillet and cook over medium heat until garlic is golden brown, 2 to 3 minutes. Add steak and onions back to the skillet, cover, and simmer over low heat until onions and steak are cooked through, about 15 minutes.

black-bean-and-feta-cheese-ugly-dip.name: Black Bean And Feta Cheese Ugly Dip
instructions: Whisk vinegar, sugar, and olive oil together in a bowl.
Mix black beans, corn, feta cheese, and green onions together in a separate bowl. Drizzle dressing over black bean mixture; toss to coat. Refrigerate dip 1 hour before serving.

black-ginger-cocktail.name: Black Ginger Cocktail

ingredients.item: Fluid ounce sweet and sour mix

instructions: Place blackberries in a shaker; muddle.
Pour rum and sweet and sour mix over muddled blackberries; fill the shaker with ice.
Cover and shake until chilled.
Pour into a glass and top with ginger beer.

black-eyed-pea-bratwurst-stew.name: Black-eyed Pea Bratwurst Stew

ingredients.prep: such as Frank's® REDHOT Buffalo Wing Sauce

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Place bratwurst sausages, black-eyed peas, green beans, potatoes, onion, garlic, chicken stock, Buffalo wing sauce, ketchup, Worcestershire sauce, thyme, salt, and black pepper in a slow cooker.
Cook on High setting until vegetables are tender and soup is thickened, 3 to 4 hours.
For a thicker stew, whisk flour and water together in a bowl until smooth. Pour mixture into stew and simmer until thickened, about 5 minutes.

blackened-cabbage-with-kelp-brown-butter.name: Blackened Cabbage With Kelp Brown Butter

ingredients.item: Pointed cabbage or green cabbage (about 1 0.5 pounds)
A spice mill or a mortar and pestle

instructions: Grind kombu in a spice mill or with a mortar and pestle to a fine powder. (You should have about ¾ tsp.) Heat oil in a medium heavy skillet (such as carbon steel or cast iron) over medium-high and add half of cabbage, cut side down (reserve remaining half for another use). Cook cabbage, undisturbed, until underside is almost blackened (the edge of the sides will start to brown as well), 10–15 minutes.

Reduce heat to medium-low, add butter to skillet, and shake pan to help butter get in, around, and under cabbage. As soon as butter is melted and foaming, tilt skillet toward you and spoon browning butter over cabbage, being sure to bathe the area around the core (thick and dense, this part will take the longest to cook), 30 seconds. Stop basting and let cabbage cook, undisturbed, 3 minutes, then baste again, 30 seconds more. Repeat cooking and basting process twice more (butter will continue to get darker as it cooks, and that's okay; add a knob or two more to bring it back from the brink), adding kelp to brown butter just before final basting. At this point, cabbage should be tender (a cake tester or skewer inserted into the core should meet with no resistance) and the outer leaves have pulled away from one another. If cabbage is not done, repeat cooking and basting process once more.

Transfer cabbage to a cutting board and cut into two quarters. Pull leaves open slightly and tuck basil here and there between a few leaves. Drizzle with vinegar and season with salt. Let cabbage sit a minute or two for basil to soften before serving.

blackened-swordfish.name: Blackened Swordfish
instructions: Heat a cast iron skillet over medium-high heat. Place melted butter in a shallow bowl. Dip fish into the butter and place on a plate. Sprinkle Creole seasoning on top of the fillets and pat it in.
Place fish in the hot skillet and cook until just starting to blacken, but not burn, about 2 minutes. Flip and cook until blackened on the other side, about 2 minutes more.

blackout-chocolate-banana-bread.name: Blackout Chocolate Banana Bread

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Plack rack in lower third of oven; preheat oven to 350°. Lightly coat a 9x5" loaf pan with nonstick cooking spray. Line bottom of pan with parchment paper, leaving a generous overhang on long sides.

Whisk ¾ cup (94 g) all-purpose flour, ½ cup (57 g) whole wheat flour, ⅓ cup (28 g) unsweetened cocoa powder, 1¼ tsp. baking soda, ¾ tsp. baking powder, and 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt in a medium bowl to combine, 30 seconds; set aside. Mash 4 large very ripe bananas with a potato masher or fork in a small mixing bowl until smooth and reserve.

Using an electric mixer on medium-high speed (or a stand mixer fitted with the paddle attachment), beat 1 cup plus 2 Tbsp. (238 g) light brown sugar and 6 Tbsp. unsalted butter, room temperature in a large bowl until light and fluffy, about 4–5 minutes. Add 2 large eggs one at a time and beat until incorporated, scraping down sides of bowl if needed. Reduce speed to medium-low, add ⅓ cup sour cream, 1 tsp. vanilla extract, and mashed bananas; beat until combined. The mixture may look grainy and broken at this point, but don’t fret! The wet ingredients will emulsify when the flour mixture is added.
Reduce mixer speed to low and gradually add dry ingredients, beating just until incorporated (do not overmix or banana bread will become tough). Fold in 4 oz. bittersweet chocolate, chopped.

Scrape batter into prepared loaf pan and smooth top. Slice remaining banana lengthwise into 3 equally thick planks and place on top of cake, cut sides up. Sprinkle batter, as well as bananas, with 1 Tbsp. demerara sugar.
Bake until a toothpick or tester inserted into the center comes out clean (there may be some melted chocolate residue left on the tester, which is fine), 65–75 minutes.

Transfer pan to a wire rack and let banana bread cool completely. Using parchment overhang, lift banana bread from pan and serve.
Do Ahead: Banana bread can be made 3 days ahead. Cool completely, then store in an airtight container at room temperature or freeze for up to 3 months.
Editor’s note: This chocolate banana bread recipe was first printed in our January 2018 issue. Head this way for more of our best banana recipes→

blueberry-crumble-recipe-comedera.name: Blueberry Crumble Recipe
instructions: We started production by adding flour, butter and sugar to a bowl.
With his hands he starts to mix his ingredients to form a sandal as shown in his photo.

In a previously prepared oven mold with a base, place a part of the dough, pounding and prestipting up slightly until golden for about five minutes at 180 °. Once time's ready, we'll clear out and add the cranberries.
With the help of a spoon or paddle potatoes pounding all cranberries to form a uniform cape, then add the rest of the dough and purple for about 20 minutes at 180 °.
We finally get out of the oven, let him stand for a few minutes. Enjoy!

blueberry-tart-lezzet.name: Blueberry Tart
instructions: 1. Mix the flour, powder sugar, baking powder, vanilla and powder from a deep container thoroughly.
2. After opening the middle in the form of the pool 1 egg, planted chopped butter in the form of cube and knead until it becomes a dough in the middle hardness.
3. Shake the stretch foil and rest for 20 minutes in the refrigerator.
4. Open the size of the mold with the help of 2/3 of the rested dough.
5. Oil the Tart mold with margarine.
6. Place the caliba from the edges of the dough you open.
7. Mix the necessary materials for mortar well in a bowl.
8. Pour over the prepared mortar dough and publish it properly.
9. The remaining dough also open the size of the weighing mold.
10. Close up your weighing.
11. 11. Fix the edges of the dough and rub the egg white.
12. Spread on File almonds.
12. August Bake it until the pre-heated oven to 160 degrees.
14 July Serve.
15.  Afiyet olsun.
16. Try tart recipe with berries with a different version.

blueberry-chia-ice-pops.name: Blueberry-chia Ice Pops
instructions: Purée jam, coconut water, lime juice, and salt in a blender until smooth. Add blueberries and pulse just to break up some of the berries. Pour into ice-pop molds, insert sticks, and freeze until solid, at least 3 hours.
Run under hot water for several seconds to unmold.
Do Ahead: Ice pops can be made 1 week ahead.

boiled-beef-lezzet.name: Boiled Beef
instructions: 1. Bake the boned piece dana meat as lean before a thick saucepan, gently until you shake and pull the water.
2. Add some water and cook for 50 minutes.
3. In the form of kere cube, all the small of potatoes, chop carrots.
4. Add the butter to the pan of onion when you want to in the dör.
5.  12 bardak su ve karabiber tanelerini ilave edin.
6. Bake for about 40 minutes until vegetables were softened in the chopped fire.
7. Serve hot.
8. What are the Tricks of the Dana Eti Penalization Recipe?The best method to timidate the meat of the bone is to use the timid pot.
9.   It will be more useful to seal meats before you start pesting.
10.   A few teeth of garlic in the pest will be flavored.
11. 11. Put the meat in the whistle saucepan and fill it with water to pass 4 fingers above.
12.   If you want to add flavor while cooking your meat, add pepper seeds or bay leaf in the pot.
12. August You can also taste vegetables such as onion carrots by jumping into boiled water.
14 July If the meats are too large and are forced to soften, add a teaspoon of carbonate.
15. Your meat will be softer.
16.  1 How many Calorie of Poring Puncture?A portion of the boiled beef is about 95 calories.
17. September A portion contains 100 grams of meat.

boiled-beef-recipe-full-of-flavor-comede.name: Boiled Beef Recipe, Full Of Flavor
boiled-beef-recipe-full-of-flavor-comede.original_name: Receta de hervido de res, lleno de sabor

ingredients.item: 700 gr de carne de res (como el osobuco, la falda, ganso, lagarto  o el morcillo.)
1 cdite of paprika or pimenton powder

instructions: Vamos a iniciar esta receta, vertiendo el agua en una olla mediana o grande y llevamos al fuego.
Cut your flesh into pieces, the size of your choice, and add it to the pot with water.
Also, you'll cut the onion and the ajes and add them.
Deja cocinar por 45 minutos aproximadamente, hasta que tu carne se ablande un poco.
While the meat's cooking, you're gonna get your vegetables and you're gonna peel them and cut them into medium cubes. Important: leave your skin to the auyama or pumpkin.
That's how you'll get the cellphone and cut it into small pieces.
When 30 minutes have passed from steaming the meat, add the pieces of mazorca or maize as they are late to cook.
Once you have finished 45 minutes of cooking the meat, you will add the other vegetables, next to carrot and papa minced into notebooks.
It's time to add salt, chicken and cellery, mix with a spoon, cover and cook for 25 minutes.
At 20 minutes after we have been boiled, we will add the final touches to our boiled.
You'll have to have a good weed and tie it up as a ball and add it to the boiled. It also incorporates a tablespoon of paprika. You'll mix and let them finish cooking.
The good weed will only give an intense taste and flavour our our boiled.
Finished cooking time, put out the fire and clear your pot. Take back the good weed as it will not be consumed.
Sirve el hervido de res con abundante caldo, carne y hortalizas.
Enjoy!

bolognese-tagliatelle.name: Bolognese Tagliatelle
instructions: Cook pancetta in a pan over medium heat until it has released its fat and is crisp, 7 to 8 minutes. Add carrots, celery, and onions; cook until vegetables soften and onions are translucent, 7 to 8 minutes. Set aside.
Heat olive oil in a 4-quart pot over medium heat. Break ground beef and pork into small chunks and add them to the pot; cook, stirring lightly, until browned, 7 to 8 minutes.

Stir pancetta-vegetable mixture into ground meat. Add wine. Reduce heat to medium-low and stir, breaking up meat until finely ground, until wine has evaporated and the pot is almost dry, 13 to 15 minutes. Add tomatoes, nutmeg, salt, and red pepper. Use the back of a spoon to break up tomatoes and continue to break down meat mixture into tiny bits, about 5 minutes.
Pour beef stock and heavy cream into the pot and reduce heat to lowest setting. Simmer, partially covered and stirring occasionally, for at least 2 hours.

Meanwhile, fill a large pot with lightly salted water and bring to a rolling boil. Cook tagliatelle at a boil until tender yet firm to the bite, about 8 minutes. Reserve 1 cup pasta water and drain well.
Stir pasta into Bolognese sauce and mix well, adding a little reserved pasta water if needed to develop a satiny coating. Top with grated Parmesan cheese.

bonbons.name: Bonbons
instructions: Mix butter, confectioners' sugar, condensed milk, coconut, chopped walnuts, and vanilla in a large bowl until well combined. Cover and chill in the refrigerator until mixture has thickened enough to roll into balls, about 2 hours.
Roll bonbon mixture into 1-inch balls and place close together, but not touching, on cookie sheets. Freeze until hard.
While bonbons are freezing, line a cookie sheet or flat surface with waxed paper. Combine chocolate chips and shortening in the top of a double boiler, over simmering water; stir until melted.
Dip each bonbon in the melted chocolate using a toothpick or a fork.
Place on waxed paper to dry.

bourbon-pecan-tart.name: Bourbon-pecan Tart
instructions: Place crust in 10-inch tart pan with removable bottom; press crust into pan. Trim overhang. Chill crust 30 minutes.

Preheat oven to 191°C. Line crust with foil; fill with dried beans. Bake until crust is set and pale golden, about 30 minutes. Remove foil and beans. Bake crust until golden brown, about 10 minutes. Place pan with crust on rimmed baking sheet.
Meanwhile, using electric mixer, beat eggs and sugar in medium bowl. Beat in corn syrup. Add butter, bourbon, vanilla, and salt; beat until blended. Stir in pecans.

Pour pecan filling into hot crust. Bake until center of filling is set, about 25 minutes. Cool tart on rack 1 hour; remove pan sides. Serve slightly warm or at room temperature. DO AHEAD Can be made 8 hours ahead. Rewarm slightly before serving, if desired.

bowl-full-of-cherry-ham-glaze.name: bowl Full Of Cherry' Ham Glaze
instructions: Stir cherry preserves, red wine, brown sugar, and allspice together in a saucepan.
Place over medium heat and bring to a simmer. Reduce heat to low, stirring often, until glaze thickens, about 10 minutes.

braga-style-cod-teleculinaria.name: Braga-style Cod
instructions: Seque as postas de bacalhau com papel absorvente e frite-as numa frigideira com azeite. Retire e reserve.
Peel and cut the potatoes into middle-thick slices. Wash them, drain them well and fry them in hot oil. Spill, season with a pinch of fine salt and reserve.

In the frying pan where you fried the cod, pour some more olive oil, if necessary, and add the onions and garlic, previously peeled and cut into slices, and the laurel leaf. Season with salt, pepper and sweet pepper and let cook, stirring until the onion becomes soft.
Have the cod on a platter, have the chips around and cover with the onion. Water with onion oil and serve immediately, splashing with chopped parsley.

bread-machine-bagels.name: Bread Machine Bagels
instructions: Preheat the oven to 191°C (190 degrees C).

Place flour, water, 2 tablespoons sugar, yeast, and salt into a bread machine in the order listed, or follow the order recommended by the manufacturer if different. Run 'Dough' cycle. Remove dough from the machine after the cycle is done, about 90 minutes.
Turn dough out onto a lightly floured surface: let rest for 10 to 15 minutes.

Cut dough into nine equal pieces. Roll each piece into a small ball and flatten into a circle. Poke a hole in the middle of each circle with your thumb. Place back onto the floured surface. Cover dough with a cloth and let rest for 10 minutes.
Meanwhile, bring 3 quarts water to a boil in a large pot. Sprinkle cornmeal onto an ungreased baking sheet.

Stir 3 tablespoons sugar into boiling water. Transfer two bagels at a time to the boiling water, working in batches, turning halfway through, about 1 minute. Drain briefly on a clean towel. Arrange on the prepared baking sheet. Brush with egg white: sprinkle with poppy seeds.
Bake in the preheated oven until golden brown, 20 to 25 minutes.

breakfast-cheesecake-with-granola-crust.name: Breakfast Cheesecake With Granola Crust
instructions: Preheat the oven to 163°C (165 degrees C). Grease a 9-inch springform pan.
Toss oats, coconut, almonds, flaxseed meal, ground ginger, and salt together in a bowl to combine.

Whisk ⅓ cup honey, egg, grated zest of 1 lemon, juice of 1 lemon, and 1 teaspoon vanilla extract together in a small bowl until thoroughly combined; stir into oat mixture using a wooden spoon, or your hands, until well combined. Firmly press mixture into the bottom and up sides of the springform pan until crust is approximately ⅓-inch-thick on all sides.

Bake in the preheated oven until edges are golden brown and bottom of crust is set, about 25 minutes. Remove from oven; cool completely in the pan, about 1 hour. Run a knife around the sides of the springform pan; gently remove crust from the pan.

Whip Neufchatel cheese in a bowl with an electric mixer on medium-high speed until completely smooth. Add Greek yogurt, 3 tablespoons honey, 1 teaspoon vanilla extract, ½ teaspoon lemon zest, and 1 teaspoon lemon juice; beat on medium-high speed until mixture is smooth and thoroughly combined. Taste and adjust sweetness, adding more honey if desired.
Pour filling into cooled crust; refrigerate cheesecake for at least 1 hour. Keep chilled until ready to serve.

british-flapjacks.name: British Flapjacks
instructions: Preheat oven to 177°C. Butter 8x8x2-inch metal baking pan. Combine first 3 ingredients in heavy medium saucepan. Stir constantly over medium-low heat until butter melts, sugar dissolves, and mixture is smooth. Remove from heat. Add oats and salt; stir until coated. Transfer mixture to prepared pan and spread out in even layer.

Bake until top is golden (edges will be darker), about 25 minutes. Cool in pan on rack 5 minutes. Cut into 4 squares; cut each into 4 triangles (mixture will still be soft). Cool completely in pan before serving.

brochetas-de-pescado.name: Brochetas De Pescado

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt
Metal or bamboo skewers (if using bamboo skewers

instructions: Pat dry 1½ lb. tuna or swordfish steaks (about 1½" thick) and cut into 1½" cubes. Season on all sides with ½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ¼ tsp. Morton salt and ½ tsp. freshly ground black pepper.

Mince and smash 3 garlic cloves, chopped, and 2 chipotle chiles in adobo, seeds removed, together into a smooth paste. Transfer to a large bowl. Add 1 Tbsp. tomato paste, 2 tsp. ground achiote (annatto seeds), 1 tsp. ground cumin, 3 Tbsp. lime juice, 2 Tbsp. avocado oil, ¼ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ⅛ tsp. Morton kosher salt, and ¼ cup water and whisk until smooth.
Transfer 2 Tbsp. adobo to a small bowl and whisk in 1 Tbsp. avocado oil and remaining 2 Tbsp. lime juice; set aside.
Transfer fish to large bowl with remaining adobo and toss to coat. Cook immediately or cover with plastic wrap and refrigerate up to 1 hour.
Prepare a grill for medium-high heat or heat a grill pan over medium-high; oil grate. Thread fish cubes onto skewers, 4–5 cubes per skewer.
Grill fish, turning often, until lightly charred, opaque, and firm to the touch, about 2 minutes per side on a grill, and about 2½ minutes per side on grill pan, 8–10 minutes total.
Transfer skewers to a platter. Season with remaining ¼ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ⅛ tsp. Morton kosher salt and drizzle with reserved adobo. Serve with lime wedges alongside.

brothy-pasta-with-miso-butter-turnips.name: Brothy Pasta With Miso-butter Turnips

ingredients.item: . freeze-dried tomato flakes or tomato powder

ingredients.prep: trimmed, greens reserved, cut into wedges

ingredients.item: Quart smoked paprika and sun-dried tomato potlikker
A spice mill or mortar and pestle

instructions: Grind tomato flakes, red pepper flakes, and ¼ tsp. salt in spice mill or with mortar and pestle to a fine powder. Transfer spiced tomato dust to an airtight container; set aside.

Combine turnips, butter, sugar, and miso in a medium high-sided skillet. Pour in water to cover turnips halfway (about 1½ cups). Bring to a boil, stirring to dissolve miso. Reduce heat to medium-low; simmer, uncovered, until turnips are tender and liquid is reduced by half, 7–9 minutes. Remove from heat; set aside.
Cook pasta in a large pot of boiling salted water, stirring occasionally, until very al dente. Drain pasta, reserving 2 cups pasta cooking liquid.

Meanwhile, bring potlikker to a boil in another large pot. Add turnip greens; cook until tender, about 2 minutes. Stir in pasta; reduce heat and cook, thinning with reserved pasta cooking liquid as needed to keep the sauce slightly brothy, until pasta is al dente, about 2 minutes. Season with salt and pepper.
To serve, ladle pasta and greens into shallow bowls; top with reserved turnips and their sauce. Sprinkle reserved spiced tomato dust over; top with microgreens (if using) and Pecorino Romano.

brown-sugar-braised-pineapple.name: Brown-sugar-braised Pineapple

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or  0.25 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Melt 2 Tbsp. unsalted butter, cut into ½" pieces, in a large skillet, preferably cast iron, over medium-high heat. Arrange 1 small ripe pineapple, peeled, cored, cut into 8–12 wedges, in a single layer in pan (they should fit snugly) and cook, undisturbed, until deep golden brown and charred in spots, 6–8 minutes. Using tongs or a fish spatula, turn over and cook until other side is deep brown, about 5 minutes.

Reduce heat to medium; add ½ cup (packed; 100 g) dark brown sugar, ½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt, one 2" piece ginger, scrubbed, thinly sliced, 2 star anise pods, and ¼ cup water to pan. Cover and cook, turning pineapple halfway through, until fruit is tender (a skewer inserted into a wedge should meet with little resistance), 8–10 minutes. Remove pan from heat and divide pineapple among plates.
Add remaining 4 Tbsp. unsalted butter, cut into ½" pieces, to sauce and whisk vigorously until butter is melted and emulsified (if sauce seems very thin, simmer for a few minutes until syrupy).
Pour sauce over pineapple and serve with scoops of coconut sorbet alongside.

bulgogi-kimbap-meat-kimbap-recipe-lezzet.name: Bulgogi Kimbap (meat Kimbap) Recipe

ingredients.item: 250 gr fine sliced beef (preferably bonfile or antricot)
2 cup of rice (kore or japanese short grain)
You can increase the aroma by adding sesame and sesame oil.
You can sprinkle the fresh onion or sesame when serving the rolls.

instructions: 1. 10&ndash with soy sauce, sugar/bal, sesame oil, garlic, pepper and reindeed onion.
2. Wash Pirinci and cook with strain, 2 1/2 cup of water.
3. Add salt and sesame oil from pişen rice.
4. Carrot and salad fine gyne; you can put it into lightçe.
5. Yü in the pan of marinated meats; 3–5 minutes in fire, pay attention to cooking more.
6. Place the Nori leaf in bamboo mat u on the floor, u broadcast in a thin layer of rice, leave 1–2 cm space on the edges.
7. Find the middle of Pirincin, carrot, place cucumber and green onions.
8. Roll nori leaf tightly with the help of bamboo mat.
9. slice the roll with a sharp bçacla, moisture the legpaper.
10. Serve susam on it.
11.  Afiyet olsun.

bulgur-soup-with-yogurt-recipe-lezzet.name: Bulgur Soup With Yogurt Recipe

ingredients.item: 4 cups of broth or chicken suy  u

instructions: 1. melt the butter in the pan.
2. Add onions and green peppers and roast to pink.
3. Unu ekleyip 1-2 dakika kavurun.
4. Then add and mix butter.
5. Add Bulguru and boiled chick.
6. Pour the broth on it.
7. Add salt, pepper, red pepper and thyme.
8. Bakgurlar cook in medium fire until softened (about 15-20 minutes).
9. Yogurt, egg road and mug in a bowl of purulent until you are whisked.
10. The juice of the water; add spoons and mix the finishing.
11. 11. 11. 11. Slowly add to orbaya and heat the sued from the wind of boiling by string.
12. Do not let boiling, or your finishing can be cut.
12. August Serve hot.
14 July U you can visit roasted pepper in butter, optional butter.
15.  Afiyet olsun.

burgers-with-fries-in-the-oven-argiro.name: Burgers With Fries In The Oven
instructions: Clean the potatoes and cut them into quinces or think slides.
In a bowl, add all the ingredients except water.
Mix very well to oil them everywhere.
Pour them into a baking pan, along with all the liquids in the bowl.
Pour with the water and bake at 2003
Put the minced meat in a bowl, rub the onions and tomatoes directly into the minced meat because we need all their liquids.
Drain the bread, drizzle it and pour it into the minced meat.
Add the Oregon, salt and pepper, vintage and olive oil.
Ferment very well to soften the mixture well.
If it's tight, sprinkle with some water.
If thin, add some bread, toast or flakes of oats.
Form into 10 or 12 pieces and add them to the allready Baked potatoes.
Continue baking for 30 more minutes, reviving the fol.
If you cook in air lower the temperature by 20

butter-and-lemon-cookies-teleculinaria.name: Butter And Lemon Cookies
instructions: Place the flour, yeast and butter, cut into cubes, in a chipper and connect it until a dough with a sanded consistency is obtained.

Add the sugar, the eggs and the lemon scrape, turn it back on, until the dough is homogeneous, then mold it into polka dots, flatten it slightly with your fingers and dispose of it on a tray lined with vegetable paper.
Take it in the oven, preheated to 180oC, for about 10 to 15 minutes. Serve sprinkled with powdered sugar.

butter-roasted-turkey-breasts.name: Butter-roasted Turkey Breasts

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper
Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Preheat oven to 425°.
Gently loosen skin from turkey breasts and rub butter under skin and all over outside of breasts; season with salt and pepper.

Scatter thyme sprigs, rosemary sprigs, and garlic over a large rimmed baking sheet and arrange turkey breasts, skin side up, on top. Roast turkey breasts, rotating halfway through, until skin is crisp and golden brown and an instant-read thermometer inserted into the thickest part of breasts registers 160° (for optimal moistness, you will want to cook the white meat of the turkey breasts to a lower temperature than you would if cooking the whole bird), 45–55 minutes.
Transfer turkey breasts to a platter and let rest 10 minutes before carving.
Serve turkey breasts with pan drippings alongside.

butternut-squash-soup-with-sage-and-saus.name: Butternut Squash Soup With Sage And Sausage
instructions: Cook and stir pork sausage in a large heavy pot or Dutch oven over medium heat until sausage is browned and crisp, 5 to 8 minutes. Remove sausage with a slotted spoon, leaving drippings in the pot. Brown the sage leaves in the hot drippings until crisp, about 30 seconds; remove sage leaves and set aside.

Cook butternut squash, celery, carrots, and onion in the remaining sausage drippings until the vegetables are softened, stirring only one time after about 5 minutes. Pour sherry into the pot and stir to dissolve any browned bits of food on the bottom of the pot. Pour in chicken and beef broth and stir in brown sugar and pumpkin pie spice. Bring the soup to a boil, reduce heat to low, and simmer until squash is tender, about 20 minutes.

Puree soup with an immersion blender, leaving a few chunks of vegetables. Pour in half-and-half and season with black pepper. Divide soup into 4 large bowls and top each serving with 1 teaspoon sour cream, cooked sausage, and 2 fried sage leaves.
